gaps.title: Inline Character Sheet Rolls
gaps.description: Character sheet does not have contextual one-click roll buttons that auto-populate formula from character stats (ability checks, saving throws, skill checks, attack rolls, damage rolls).
gaps.root_cause: RollHistoryPanel exists and displays typed rolls, but no RollButton components are wired into the character sheet sections.
implementation_steps: Create useCharacterRoll(characterId) hook that computes modifiers from character abilities/proficiencies
Add RollButton component accepting { label, formula, rollType, characterId, campaignId? }
Wire into character sheet sections: ability scores, saves, skills, attacks, spells
Record via existing useRecordRoll with character_id and optional campaign_id

gaps.title: Character Export/Import
gaps.description: No export-to-PDF/JSON or import-from-file functionality exists.
implementation_steps: exportCharacterJson(characterId) — fetch character + abilities + equipment + features + spells → download as .json
exportCharacterPdf(characterId) — generate styled PDF using jspdf or @react-pdf/renderer
importCharacterJson(file) — validate JSON schema, create character via existing mutation
Add Export/Import buttons to character list page and character sheet header

gaps.title: Post-Encounter XP/Reward Distribution
gaps.description: Combat sessions can be ended but there is no dedicated UI for calculating and distributing XP/loot after an encounter.
gaps.root_cause: useEndCombatSession only sets status to 'ended'; no reward calculation or distribution step follows.
implementation_steps: Add EncounterRewards component shown when combat session status becomes 'ended'
Compute XP from encounter monster CRs (data available in encounter builder)
Provide party member selector and distribution mode (equal/custom)
Call useUpdateCharacter to increment XP on each selected character
Optionally log reward event via campaign_session log

gaps.title: Player Map View
gaps.description: VTT routes exist but appear DM-centric. No evidence of a read-only player view with shared fog-of-war state synced in real-time.
gaps.root_cause: VTT components were built for DM use; no role-based rendering or realtime player subscription layer.
implementation_steps: Create VTTPlayerView component that subscribes to VTT state via Supabase realtime
Filter token visibility based on fog-of-war mask set by DM
Allow player to drag their own token, broadcasting position via realtime channel
Route /campaigns/:campaignId/vtt with role-based rendering (DM full controls, player view)

gaps.title: Homebrew in Character Flows
gaps.description: Homebrew content has structured types matching compendium categories, but character creation and level-up flows pull options only from static compendium data, not from user's homebrew library.
gaps.root_cause: compendiumResolver.ts does not merge homebrew records into option pools served to character flows.
implementation_steps: In compendiumResolver.ts, add merge step fetching user's published homebrew + campaign-scoped homebrew
Tag merged entries with source: 'homebrew' for UI differentiation
Filter by content_type matching current selection context
Add visual badge in selection UIs to distinguish homebrew from official content

gaps.title: Marketplace Content Injection
gaps.description: Downloads are recorded and entitlements tracked, but downloaded content is not injected into user's compendium or character creation flows.
gaps.root_cause: useRecordMarketplaceDownload only records the download event; no content merge into compendium resolver.
implementation_steps: Add useMarketplaceEntitledContent hook to fetch entitled items' content payloads
Merge into compendium resolver alongside homebrew merge
Check entitlement in character flow selection filters

gaps.title: Content License Enforcement
gaps.description: License field exists on marketplace items but no validation or enforcement occurs when content is consumed.
gaps.root_cause: License field is stored but never checked in any consumption pathway.
implementation_steps: Add license display dialog in marketplace detail view before download confirmation
Store license acceptance in entitlement record
Show attribution badge on content sourced from marketplace

gaps.title: Campaign-Scoped Dice Rolls
gaps.description: roll_history has campaign_id column and campaign chat supports roll message type, but DiceRoller page always passes campaign_id: null.
gaps.root_cause: DiceRoller.tsx does not expose a campaign selector; useRecordRoll always receives null campaign_id.
implementation_steps: Add campaign selector dropdown to DiceRoller page (from useMyCampaigns + useJoinedCampaigns)
Pass selected campaign_id to useRecordRoll
Optionally send roll as message_type 'roll' to campaign chat via useSendCampaignMessage

gaps.title: Inline Character Rolls
gaps.description: Same gap as GAP-C10 — character sheet needs contextual roll buttons with auto-populated modifiers.
implementation_steps: See GAP-C10 implementation steps.

gaps.title: Offline Data Caching (Populate IndexedDB)
gaps.description: OfflineStorageManager has IndexedDB stores with full CRUD methods, but no code path populates these caches during normal online use.
gaps.root_cause: storeCompendiumItem/storeCharacter methods exist but are never called from React hooks or data-fetching layers.
implementation_steps: In useCharacter/useCharacters, after successful Supabase fetch, call offlineStorage.storeCharacter(data)
In compendium resolver, after fetching detail, call offlineStorage.storeCompendiumItem(data)
In query queryFn, if fetch fails due to offline error, fall back to offlineStorage.getCharacter(id) / searchCompendium(query)
Add 'cached' badge in UI when serving stale offline data

gaps.title: Push Notifications
gaps.description: No Web Push API integration — no PushManager.subscribe(), no VAPID key configuration, no push endpoint registration. useNotifications is localStorage-only in-app notifications.
gaps.root_cause: Feature was never built. Only in-app notification center exists.
implementation_steps: Generate VAPID key pair; store public key in env, private key in server config
Add usePushSubscription hook: request permission → pushManager.subscribe() → store subscription in user_push_subscriptions table
Server-side (Edge Function or API route): web-push library to send notifications
Service worker: add push event listener to display Notification
Trigger points: session scheduled, combat turn change, campaign invite received, chat @mention
Settings UI: user can toggle notification categories

gaps.title: Background Sync API Integration
gaps.description: useOfflineSyncStatus processes queue when isOnline changes via React re-render, but does not use the Background Sync API for processing when app is in background.
gaps.root_cause: Sync is React-driven; no service worker sync event registration.
implementation_steps: In BackgroundSyncManager.addToQueue, after saving to localStorage, call navigator.serviceWorker.ready.then(reg => reg.sync.register('offline-sync-queue'))
In service worker, handle sync event to process queue
Keep existing React-based sync as fallback for browsers without Background Sync support
